_comment: Reference example: high-quality boss plan. Score 85/100. Use as few-shot calibration.
goal: Build a CSV file cleaner tool with a Python GUI that can trim whitespace, remove blank rows, remove duplicates, and normalize headers. Include sample data and documentation.

plan.plan: Build with Python/Tkinter: researcher gathers library docs, two coders split backend and UI, UI developer provides sample data and README.

tasks.title: Research pandas and tkinter file dialog APIs
tasks.description: Investigate: (1) pandas read_csv and DataFrame cleaning methods — dropna, drop_duplicates, str.strip, rename. (2) tkinter.filedialog.askopenfilename and asksaveasfilename usage. Return a 1-page summary with import statements and function signatures the coders will use. Confirm pandas 2.x API compatibility.

tasks.title: Write csv_cleaner.py with pandas cleaning functions
tasks.description: Create csv_cleaner.py. Implement: trim_whitespace(df), remove_blank_rows(df), remove_duplicates(df), normalize_headers(df) — each accepts and returns a DataFrame. Use pandas based on researcher findings. Include type annotations and docstrings. Add if __name__=='__main__' smoke test block that loads a sample CSV and prints shape before/after.

tasks.title: Write main.py with tkinter UI for file load, preview, clean, export
tasks.description: Create main.py. Import csv_cleaner (functions: trim_whitespace, remove_blank_rows, remove_duplicates, normalize_headers — use exact these names). Build tkinter window: File>Open button using filedialog.askopenfilename, ttk.Treeview for CSV preview (max 200 rows), four checkboxes for each cleaning operation, Clean button that calls selected csv_cleaner functions on the loaded DataFrame, File>Save As button that writes cleaned DataFrame to a user-chosen path. Use 900x600 geometry. Disable Save button until file is loaded.

tasks.title: Write sample_data.csv and README.md
tasks.description: Create sample_data.csv with 10 rows including: 2 blank rows, 2 duplicate rows, column headers with trailing spaces and mixed case (e.g. ' First Name ', 'LAST NAME '), and cells with leading/trailing whitespace — designed to exercise all four cleaning operations. Create README.md with: pip install pandas requirement, python main.py run instruction, feature list of the four operations, and a screenshot placeholder section.

_rubric_notes.description_depth: -3: RESEARCHER task description is strong but could name exact pandas version constraint
_rubric_notes.filename_presence: All four titles name output files
_rubric_notes.api_contract: main.py description explicitly names all four csv_cleaner functions — perfect contract
_rubric_notes.domain_accuracy: All tasks are correctly scoped to Python desktop CSV tool

notes: Gold standard for Python desktop benchmark. Researcher precedes coders. API contract is explicit with exact function names in both CODER descriptions. UIDEVELOPER task has concrete sample data spec (10 rows, 2 blank, 2 dupe). Missing only: RESEARCHER could specify pandas version; main.py description could mention threading for large files.
